title: Tech Savy
description: The Tech Savy Mod introduces an advanced, high-tech world into Minecraft, packed with innovative gadgets, powerful tools, and futuristic materials that offer players unique abilities and gameplay experiences. Designed around three primary ores — Duratite,
body:
Tech Savy is a futuristic technology mod that empowers players to harness robotics and advanced engineering in Minecraft. Dive into a world where you can create powerful robots, design custom equipment, and elevate your gameplay to new heights!

Current Features:
Robots & Androids

Humanoid Robot: A versatile robotic companion designed for various tasks and combat assistance.
Humanoid Robot (Girl): A stylish and customizable female variant with unique capabilities.
Humanoid Robot V2: An upgraded version featuring enhanced abilities and intelligence.
Evil Humanoid Robot: A dangerous adversary programmed for destruction.
Android: A hybrid creation that combines human-like intelligence with robotic durability.
Half-Silicone Android: A unique design blending organic and mechanical elements for agility and strength.
Boots for Enhanced Mobility

Speed Boots (V1, V2, V3): Increase your speed dramatically.
Jump Boots (V1, V2): Achieve impressive heights with enhanced jumping power.
Jet Boots (V1, V2, V3): Experience the thrill of flight with advanced propulsion technology.
Power & Engineering

Power Core: A powerful energy source that fuels your robots and machinery.
Energy Conduit: Efficiently distribute energy to all your devices.
Motorized Joints: Essential for creating advanced robotic limbs and exoskeletons.
Digital Devices & Cyber Warfare

Micro Chip: A crucial component for crafting high-tech devices.
USB: Store valuable data and programs for your robots.
USB with AI: Unlock a helpful AI assistant to optimize your tasks.
USB with Virus & Malware: Use these to infect systems, creating strategic advantages in combat.
